title: Zafiro Hotels | Orbis Insulae Cocktail
hotspot1_desc: Zafiro logo printed with natural pigments and golden glitter.
hotspot2_desc: Silky aquafaba foam that supports the aromatic structure.
hotspot3_desc: The vibrant blend of melon and citrus that defines the flavor.
recipe_desc: A unique combination of artisanal liqueurs and natural juices from the Balearic Islands. Gin Balearic, the soul of this cocktail, is combined with elderflower, fresh cucumber, and Blue Curaçao to create an experience that smells and tastes like Mallorca.
recipe_item1: 50 ml of Balearic Gin
recipe_item2: 50 ml of Elderflower liqueur
recipe_item3: 12.5 ml of Lemon juice
recipe_item4: 20 ml of Liquid brown sugar
recipe_item5: 12.5 ml of Non-alcoholic Blue Curaçao
recipe_item7: 3 Cucumber slices (approx. 1 cm thick)
recipe_footer: Gin Balearic is the soul of this cocktail. Handcrafted in the Balearic Islands with local botanicals, it is combined with elderflower and fresh cucumber to create a drink that smells and tastes like Mallorca.
step1_a: Cut 3 cucumber slices approx. 1 cm thick.
step1_b: Peel the slices to remove any bitterness.
step1_d: Place them in the cocktail shaker.
step1_e: Muddle gently to extract the juice and aroma.
step2_intro: Add to the shaker, in this order:
step3_note: This emulsifies the egg white and creates a creamy texture.
step4_a: Strain the mixture into another shaker using the Hawthorne strainer.
step4_c: Shake again for about 15 seconds, until the shaker feels very cold.
step5_a: Pour the cocktail into a coupe glass using the Hawthorne strainer and fine mesh strainer (double strain).
step5_b: Use the bar spoon to gently press and get every last drop.
step6_a: Use a stencil with the desired logo (e.g. Zafiro).
step6_b: Dust over the top (icing sugar or decorative powder).
step6_c: With acid syrup, decorate the partial rim of the glass.
step6_note: This creates a visual and flavour contrast between sweet and sour.
video_subtitle: The art behind the Orbis Insulae Cocktail
video_text1: Watch the full preparation of the Orbis Insulae Cocktail: technique, precision and the final touch that makes it a one-of-a-kind experience.
